question: Which team won the most recent Super Bowl before the team that won the Super Bowl in 2015?

documents.title: Super Bowl XLIX
documents.sentence_text: The New England Patriots defeated the Seattle Seahawks 28-24 in Super Bowl XLIX on February 1, 2015.

documents.title: Super Bowl XLVIII
documents.sentence_text: The Seattle Seahawks defeated the Denver Broncos 43-8 in Super Bowl XLVIII on February 2, 2014.

documents.title: Seattle Seahawks
documents.sentence_text: The Seahawks won their first Super Bowl in franchise history in 2014.
